name: FileExecutableDetected
trigger_scenarios: The event is emitted when the configured Sysmon operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: TargetFilename ending .exe, .dll, or .ps1 under C:\\Users\\ or C:\\Temp\\ is newly detected executable staging; correlate Image and ProcessGuid with Event 1 and execution.
Use the initiating image and ProcessGuid to join Event ID 1 command-line context.
Use the timestamp to correlate with related activity.

false_positives: Approved administration, management agents, and deployment tools can generate this telemetry.
Baseline expected hosts, signed binaries, and change windows before suppression.
detection_notes: TargetFilename ending .exe, .dll, or .ps1 under C:\\Users\\ or C:\\Temp\\ is newly detected executable staging; correlate Image and ProcessGuid with Event 1 and execution. This is a T1105 Ingress Tool Transfer signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the initiating Image, ProcessGuid, and logon context before closing.
kql_snippet:
Sysmon
| where EventID == 29
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Image, ProcessGuid
spl_snippet: index=sysmon EventCode=29 | table _time, host, Image, ProcessGuid
